subcodes.first_line: O Thou Ali Akbar: Whosoever is the servant of believers is the leader of the friends, and whosoever is the thrall of the Beloved ones
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی اکبر هرکس خادم احباب است سرور اصحاب است و هرکه چاکر دوستان است شهریار
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness
